package rulecoverage

func NegativeRepeatedLargeMapLiteralResponseConstruction() string {
    ruleID := "repeated_large_map_literal_response_construction"
    family := "gin"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Large map-literal response assembly on hot routes where a stable typed response would be cheaper."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
